success_criteria: Contract gains ExtractInto []string field with yaml/json tag extract_into,omitempty
validate.go rule 11 extends to validate every ExtractInto entry under existing per-entry rules (no traversal, no absolute, no control chars, no drive letters, no UNC, no zero-width)
validate.go gains rule 17 rejecting extract_into entries with code-file extensions (.go, .py, .ts, .tsx, .js, .md, .yaml, .yml, .json, .toml, .rs, .java, .cpp, .h, .c)
PreToolUse hook reads ETHOS_VERIFIER_EXTRACT_INTO and authorizes Write/Edit to non-existing paths under any listed directory; existing path Write/Edit still requires ETHOS_VERIFIER_ALLOWLIST match
SubagentStart sets ETHOS_VERIFIER_EXTRACT_INTO from m.ExtractInto in the verifier env block
Verifier isolation block lists extract_into alongside write_set with prose distinguishing modify vs create

findWriteSetConflicts extends to the six-rule closed form per DES-052 — ws-file/ws-file (existing), ws-file/ws-dir (existing), ws-dir/ws-dir (existing), ws-file/ei-dir is a conflict iff D is a prefix of P (new), ws-dir/ei-dir is a conflict iff segment-prefix overlap (new), ei-dir/ei-dir never conflicts; relation is symmetric
Archetype struct gains ExtractIntoConstraints []string field; archetype.go enforcement applies the same glob rules as WriteSetConstraints
Seed archetypes updated per DES-052 default table (design → docs/**, test → tests/** + *_test.go, investigate → docs/** + .tmp/**, others empty)
lint.go gains lintMonolithPressure and lintExtractIntoFileEntries warnings per DES-052
Tests cover every new code path — per-entry validation, PreToolUse stat branch, SubagentStart env propagation, admission control table rows, archetype constraint enforcement, lint heuristics
make check passes — go vet, staticcheck, shellcheck, markdownlint, all tests pass with -race -count=1
make check-oo does not regress (no decline in OO scores on touched files)
CHANGELOG.md gains an Added entry under
Round-by-round summary captured in the mission reflection so the leader can append it when transitioning DES-052 from DRAFT to SETTLED (DESIGN.md is leader-authored; not in this worker's write_set)

Commit incrementally — one commit per logical step (schema field, then validation, then PreToolUse, then SubagentStart, then admission, then archetypes, then lint, then archetype YAMLs, then CHANGELOG/DESIGN). Each commit must pass make check. Do not accumulate more than 30 minutes of uncommitted changes.
ethos mission dispatch accepts --extract-into flag taking comma-separated relative directories; help text names the flag and links DES-052
Empty/omitted --extract-into leaves Contract.ExtractInto as a nil slice — backward compatible
Populated --extract-into entries flow through splitCSV to Contract.ExtractInto and are validated by the same per-entry rules as write_set (validateWriteSetEntry plus rule 17)

cmd/ethos/mission_test.go gains a subtest exercising dispatch with --extract-into — confirms successful create, the created contract carries ExtractInto, and a malformed entry (code-file extension or traversal) is rejected with a clear error
AGENTS.md mission contract YAML example shows extract_into alongside write_set with a one-line annotation distinguishing modify-existing vs create-new
AGENTS.md dispatch example uses --extract-into alongside --write-set
AGENTS.md gains one short paragraph on the asymmetric semantics — modify-existing-via write_set, create-new-via either axis, never modify-via-extract_into — pointing at DES-052 for the full design
AGENTS.md archetypes section names extract_into_constraints and points at the DES-052 default table in DESIGN.md
CHANGELOG [Unreleased] gains an Added entry for the dispatch flag and an Added entry for the docs alignment
make check clean; make check-oo does not regress
Commit incrementally — one commit per logical step (CLI flag + test, AGENTS.md docs, CHANGELOG). Each commit must pass make check. Do not accumulate more than 30 minutes of uncommitted changes.
